recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

recommendations.title: Cactus Flower
recommendations.overview: A dentist pretends to be married to avoid commitment, but when he falls for his girlfriend and proposes, he must recruit his lovelorn nurse to pose as his wife.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.

recommendations.title: The Departed
recommendations.overview: To take down South Boston's Irish Mafia, the police send in one of their own to infiltrate the underworld, not realizing the syndicate has done likewise. While an undercover cop curries favor with the mob kingpin, a career criminal rises through the

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Get Married If You Can
recommendations.overview: Ana Paula catches her fiancé cheating. After a night of drinking, she wakes up far from home, not so certain she wants to go back.

recommendations.title: Cassandra's Dream
recommendations.overview: The tale of two brothers with serious financial woes. When a third party proposes they turn to crime, things go bad and the two become enemies.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.
